_comment: Global configuration for the Talent Inbox Automation system. Fill in all TODO values before deploying.
_ai_enabled_comment: HARD BLOCKER — set to false to prevent ALL OpenAI API calls. Triage and reply drafting are skipped entirely. Inbox syncing still runs. Only set to true when Colin explicitly re-enables AI.
_auto_send_enabled_comment: Auto-send list is now derived from sop.md (Auto Send: yes/no per talent). No longer a separate list here.
_spam_sweep_enabled_comment: Set to true to re-enable spam folder scanning. Drafts replies to score=3 emails caught by Gmail spam filter, leaving them untouched in Spam. Paused 2026-05-27 pending Marco review.

openai._triage_model_comment: Use gpt-4o-mini for triage (cheaper, nearly as accurate). Switch to gpt-4o only if quality drops.
openai._reply_model_comment: Always use gpt-4o for reply drafting — quality matters here.
openai._temperature_comment: Low temperature for triage = consistent, deterministic scoring.

triage._global_minimum_rate_comment: Set to 0 to use per-talent minimums only. Override here to enforce a global floor across all inboxes.

never_reply._comment: Emails matching any rule here are immediately archived (Score 1) without calling GPT. Add senders/domains/keywords that should NEVER receive an auto-reply.
never_reply._senders_comment: Exact sender email addresses to block.

reply._draft_mode_comment: true = Phase 2 saves replies as Gmail Drafts for supervisor review instead of sending. Set to false only after Marco approves full autonomous send (~1 month trial). When draft_mode is false, send_delay_minutes applies.
reply._send_delay_comment: Minutes to wait after drafting before sending. Only applies when draft_mode is false. Set to 0 to disable. Keep at 15 during Phase 2 testing.

digest._send_time_comment: TODO: Confirm exact time with supervisor.
digest._recipient_email_comment: TODO: Fill in supervisor email address (or comma-separated list for multiple recipients).
digest.subject_template: Daily Inbox Report — {{DATE}} — {{TOTAL}} emails processed, {{NEEDS_REVIEW}} need review

google_sheets._master_log_sheet_id_comment: Master Activity Log Google Sheet (provided 2026-04-17). Tab name: 'Master Log'.
google_sheets._sop_matrix_sheet_id_comment: TODO: Paste the Google Sheet ID for the SOP matrix. See sheets/sop_data.json for the full SOP data already extracted from the uploaded XLSX.

make._workspace_zone_comment: TODO: Confirm your Make workspace zone (us1, eu1, etc.).
make._error_alert_email_comment: TODO: Email address to receive immediate error alerts when a Make scenario fails or OAuth expires.

guardian._comment: Self-healing watchdog — all thresholds tunable without redeploy
guardian._sender_talent_key_comment: Talent whose Gmail OAuth token is used to send Guardian alert emails. Must have an active token in the DB.
